notes:
Milestone after parts 5 (local-notifications) + 6 (checklist-export-import) audit-passed. 7/9 criteria done. Director armed the FINAL two parts, SERIALIZED (not parallel): part 7 (reduced-motion) then part 9 (pe-build-gate). This closes the DoD.

SEQUENCING (enforced by deps, not by trust): part 9's PLAN depends on cheffy_p7_reducedmotion_build, which is audit_required -- so part 9 cannot lease until part 7's build reaches done (= its cold audit PASSED). The coordinator walks the batch and simply won't make part 9 runnable until part 7 is audit-passed. Part 9 is therefore guaranteed LAST, after every interactive surface AND reduced-motion have landed and been audited. Do NOT hand-lease part 9 ahead of that gate.

PART 7 -- reduced-motion (criterion: reduced-motion): full RESEARCH -> PLAN -> BUILD -> TEST chain, all LIGHT weight (this is a CSS-only sweep, not new behavior). A single cross-cutting @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) treatment across BOTH src/components/Cheffy.astro AND src/components/CheffyPanel.astro that neutralizes every animation/transition now present after parts 2-6 (mascot idle -- part 2 already covers this one -- attention/notification-dot pulse, processing spinner, panel open/close, dialogue expression transitions, hover/focus). No layout shift, no hidden content: only motion stops; opacity/visibility state swaps stay functional. CSS-only -- touch ONLY the two components' <style> blocks; do NOT touch Layout.astro. BUILD is audit_required; AUDIT auto-enqueued by the builder. TEST = per-selector coverage inspection + npm run build green.

PART 9 -- pe-build-gate (criterion: pe-build-gate): PLAN -> BUILD -> TEST (RESEARCH intentionally SKIPPED -- the mount contract is pinned by CHEFFY-SYSTEM.md + Layout.astro's existing structure; noted in the PLAN objective). The final <Cheffy /> mount into src/layouts/Layout.astro (import + render once at end-of-body) -- the single site-wide switch that turns Cheffy on. BUILD (standard, audit_required) touches ONLY Layout.astro; AUDIT auto-enqueued. TEST (standard) is the DURABLE DoD GATE: npm run build (astro check then astro build) green with zero errors, no console errors on any of the 28 pages, and master-parity with Cheffy JS disabled (progressive enhancement -- markup + deferred script only). A clean part-9 audit+test signs off the whole DoD; the Director will then post the PR proposal to CALLBOARD.

Durable gate = npm run build (astro check then astro build); no test framework by design -- TEST rungs use ephemeral throwaway Node/manual verification, never a committed vitest/jest. Standing CALLBOARD gate (DOM smoke harness) remains UNANSWERED by the Producer -- the Director has nudged it to informational (its window closed: only a CSS sweep + the mount remain, no new interactive handlers). Do NOT block parts 7/9 on it and do NOT duplicate that board entry.
